title: MobSteer | Ride Mobs & WASD Control
description: Ride mobs and control any mob that can move using WASD movement!
body:
# MobSteer
### Take full control over practically any mob in Minecraft!

> ✅ **Versions:** **1.21.x** – **26.2**

> ⚠️ **Required:** **Paper** / **Purpur** or other Paper-based forks

> 🚫 **Not supported:** **Folia** / **Spigot**

## Description
**MobSteer** is a **Rideable mobs** plugin that allows you to ride and control almost any mob in the game. Do you want to fly with a bee, swim with a dolphin, or just walk around with a chicken? This plugin lets you do just that! You can control almost all mobs using the WASD keys.

## Features
* **Right-Click & Ride:** No commands needed, simply right-click any mob and start controlling it instantly.
* **Full Control:** Take charge of almost any mob using WASD (fly, swim, walk).
* **Compatibility:** Works with most monsters and animals, optimized for Purpur and Paper.
* **Customization:** Fully configurable dismount style, speeds, and taming rules.
* **Ender Dragon:** Can be ridden, but beware it may break blocks!

## Gameplay
![Gameplay GIF](https://i.imgur.com/MGNpJEO.gif)

## Commands
Use `/steer` to mount a mob, and `/msr` for configuration.

* `/steer` - Use this command to mount and control a mob.
* `/msr reload` - Reloads the configuration file.
* `/msr blacklist [add|remove] <mob>` - Manages the mob blacklist.
* `/msr ride [all|user] <true|false>` - Allows riding and /steer for everyone or a specific player.
* `/msr hover <true|false>` - Toggle hover mode.
* `/msr autostep <true|false>` - Toggle auto step.

## Notes
* Horses and similar mobs have a custom vanilla like taming system provided by this plugin by default.

## Configuration
* **Custom Dismount:** Choose between vanilla dismounting or requiring a triple shift to get off.
* **Speed Control:** Override speed for all mobs or set specific speeds for Ender Dragons, Withers, etc.
* **Blacklist:** Easily restrict certain mobs from being ridden.
* **Taming System:** Control if players can ride their own pets or pets belonging to others.
* **Invulnerability:** Make the mob invulnerable while being ridden.
* **Messages & ActionBar:** Fully customize all plugin messages (supports MiniMessage and legacy colors).
* **Hooks:** Integration with WorldGuard, LuckPerms (group-based restrictions) and GadgetsMenu pets.

## Permissions
* `mobsteer.use` - Allows riding mobs.
* `mobsteer.steer` - Allows using the `/steer` command. (requires mobsteer.use to work)
* `mobsteer.admin` - Access to administrative commands (`/msr`) and bypasses all mount restrictions.
* `mobsteer.*` - Full access to the plugin.

## Statistics
